global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with bold text elements promoting travel offers.
global.main_message: Promoting travel destinations with special fares.

elements.label: Abstract orange background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background with abstract shapes creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: NomadLaye logo
elements.description: Bold, large text displaying 'NomadLaye' in a prominent position at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Dream text
elements.description: Stylized text reading 'Dream' in a large, eye-catching font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Destinations await
elements.description: Text stating 'destinations await' in a clear, readable font, positioned below the 'Dream' text.

elements.label: Special fares today
elements.description: Text that reads 'Special fares today' in a smaller font, placed beneath the main body text.

elements.label: Price €29.99
elements.description: A prominent price tag displaying '€29.99' in a bold font, located near the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button labeled 'Book now' in a contrasting color, positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Abstract shape
elements.description: A small abstract shape in the top left corner, adding visual interest to the background.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small, less defined shape located towards the bottom of the ad, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape in the center of the ad, serving as a decorative element.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: Text that conveys the main message of the ad, located at the bottom and emphasizing the offer.
elements.text_content: destinations await Special fares today €29.99 Book now

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A decorative element at the top of the ad, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Dream text
elements.description: A smaller text element that reiterates the theme of dreaming, positioned centrally.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and modern, key elements include bold text and a call-to-action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
